title: Error Code Aliases
description:
Registry of deprecated error-code aliases and their replacements. Used by scripts/lint-error-codes.cjs to allow storyboard assertions on renamed codes during a deprecation window. Each entry maps an old (deprecated) code to the new canonical code in error-code.json.

The lint emits a warning — not an error — on storyboard references to aliased codes, giving authors visibility without breaking the build. When the alias is removed from this file, references to the old code become lint errors.

Lifecycle:
1. Land rename: add entry here, migrate new code to error-code.json, update SDK/docs.
2. Deprecation window (typically one minor release): authors migrate storyboards; warnings surface in CI.
3. Sunset: remove alias entry; stale references fail the build.

The file is checked into source but MAY be empty when no renames are in flight.

aliases.description: Map of deprecated error code → current canonical code. Both keys and values MUST be strings matching the /^[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]*$/ convention; values MUST exist in error-code.json.

$comment: This file is intentionally empty at creation. Add entries here only when actively renaming a code — do not pre-register aliases 'just in case'.
